changes.reason: Continue the successful Batch D admission-geometry path without exit compression. Current charm_wall_breakaway_long is high convexity and efficient, but only 5 trades; lowering the higher-low requirement one grid step may admit another valid breakaway continuation while keeping require-breakout and wall-distance controls intact.

Keep the prior successful wider wall-distance boundary that improved score and net profit versus run_024. This preserves the admission expansion mechanism that worked while avoiding the previously harmful take-profit compression keys.

Leave the ES-VWAP cap permissive at the current grid ceiling so this test isolates structure geometry rather than reintroducing the failed exit/distance compression experiment. The profile's edge is convex wall breakaway capture, not tighter target realization.

expected_effect: Should test whether charm_wall_breakaway_long can add one or two high-payoff VALID_0DTE continuation trades while preserving profile PnL/exposure above roughly 225 and total net profit within 98% of run_001. Main risk is admitting weak wall-chase entries; reject if worst MAE worsens, profile efficiency falls materially, or total PnL/exposure declines.
label: charm-wall-geometry-followthrough
rationale: Choose exactly one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. The strongest recent positive experiment was charm-wall admission geometry, while exit compression and direct 1DTE/pullback tightening have hurt. This keeps the mechanism to profile-specific admission breadth, avoids global veto tightening, avoids take-profit compression, and protects pullback/squeeze/charm-pin fast winners.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long has only 5 VALID_0DTE trades but contributes $985.6, 197.1 average PnL, 234.4 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 146.2, and no slow >=12h trades. The run_024 to run_027 admission probe improved score by 217 and net profit by $221 without worsening worst MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Admission Follow-Through
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample risk is high; relaxing higher-low geometry may add lower-quality wall-chase entries or cannibalize existing charm-wall winners without improving total score.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway context with require-breakout true, distance above charm wall within the expanded 25-point box, and only marginal ES higher-low confirmation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL/exposure remains >=225, total net profit remains >=98% of run_001, completed trades do not drop more than 10%, slow_12h remains 0, and total worst MAE stays no worse than -527.
